tipo_cuenta: What type of account do you want to create?
usuario_desc: Adopt pets and track your process
capacidad_placeholder: Number of pets it can accommodate
exito_mensaje: Your request has been submitted. An administrator will review your data.
campos_requeridos: All required fields must be filled
contraseña_corta: Password must be at least 8 characters
email_hint: Use a valid email. You will receive important notifications.
telefono_invalido: Phone must contain only numbers (7-15 digits)

registro_sanitario_registrado: This health registration is already registered
capacidad_hint: Maximum number of pets you can accommodate (optional)
mensaje_user: You are one step away from joining our community
mensaje_user_item1: Adopt pets that need a home
mensaje_user_item3: Follow rescues and track their progress
mensaje_user_item4: Receive notifications about animals in danger
info_seguridad: Your data is safe and will only be used for platform purposes.
exito_mensaje_fundacion:
Your registration request has been submitted.

An administrator will review your information and contact you soon by email.

Thank you for joining our mission to help animals.
exito_mensaje_veterinaria:
Your registration request has been submitted.

Your account is pending approval by an administrator.

We will notify you when your account is active.
exito_mensaje_user:
Welcome to our community

Your account has been successfully created.

You can now start exploring and helping animals in need of a home.
exito_info_fundacion: We will send you an email when your account is approved.
exito_info_veterinaria: We will send you an email when your account is approved.
error_email_duplicado:
This email is already registered.

Please use another email or sign in.
error_nit_duplicado:
The Tax ID is already registered.

Please verify the number and try again.
error_registro_sanitario_duplicado:
The health registration is already registered.

Please verify the number and try again.
error_conexion:
Connection error.

Cannot connect to the server. Please check your connection and try again.

quotes.quote1: Adopting is not buying, it's saving a life
quotes.quote2: They don't need words, just love and a home
quotes.quote3: A faithful friend is waiting to change your life
quotes.quote4: The best investment is giving love to those who have none
quotes.quote5: Every rescued pet is a story of hope
